definition:
1. hate, hatred : and so, 
2. passive hate borne  one, a being hated , [variant datesTragica Adespota, (Plato Philosophus) 
3. active hate felt against  another, a grudge , (Sophocles Tragicus), etc.; μ. τινός τινι felt by  one against  another, (Euripides) 
4. of persons, a hateful object , = μίσημα, [variant datesTragica Adespota (ML)
